message:
fix(reliability): infinite loop in diagnostics truncation and integer overflow in reservations

Fix two reliability bugs:

diagnostics.rs: The diagnostic report truncation loop could spin
forever because tools_detail and locks vectors were re-truncated every
iteration without tracking whether truncation had already happened.
Add tools_truncated and locks_truncated boolean flags to break the loop
after the first truncation pass.

queries.rs: Change base + extend to base.saturating_add(extend) in
renew_reservations() to prevent integer overflow on reservation
timestamp arithmetic when expiry times are far in the future.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
